rules.product_identity: Never alter product shape, label, logo, packaging structure, or key colors.
rules.visibility: Product must be clearly visible in hero, usage, and closing frames.
rules.texture: For cosmetics and grooming products, texture shots should look realistic and premium.
rules.hands_and_faces: Hands and faces must look natural and not distorted.
rules.background: Use clean premium backgrounds; avoid visual clutter.
rules.compliance: Do not imply medical treatment, guaranteed results, or unverified certification claims.
